---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new skill, reference, or harness capability.
title: "feat: <short summary>"
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem

<!-- What failure or friction does this address? Prefer observed signal
(repeated agent struggle, PR feedback, audit gap) over speculation. -->

## Proposal

<!-- The smallest change that resolves the problem. Name the file(s) or
skill(s) touched. -->

## Acceptance criteria

<!-- Observable, mechanical. Same shape as the PR template. -->

- [ ]
- [ ]

## Alternatives considered

<!-- At least one, ideally "do nothing — here is why that is wrong". -->

## Scope boundary

<!-- What this proposal is explicitly NOT doing. Prevents scope creep in
review. -->
